computed_from.note: LATE PREMARKET RUN 15:21 ET (should have been 08:30). Built from 2026-06-08 live session data. All prior levels (from 06-02/03) expired — market moved ~$20 lower. All levels rebuilt fresh from today's chart.

levels.label: SESSION_HIGH_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: Today's RTH session high (11:05 ET, H=745.33). First ceiling for any bounce tomorrow. Rejection here = bear setup elevated; break+hold = bull extension.
levels.notes: ~$6.42 above current price 738.91. Strong multi-bar ceiling from morning rally peak.

levels.label: PMH_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: Today's premarket high (08:50 ET). First resistance zone above open. Break above = bull momentum signal.

levels.label: RTH_OPEN_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: Today's RTH open bar (09:30 ET). Price failed to reclaim and spent the session below. Acts as resistance on any bounce. Reclaim + hold = bull trigger candidate.
levels.notes: ~$4.40 above current. Downside gap from prior-week close now open.

levels.label: INTRADAY_BASE_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: Tested 5+ times across the session (10:00, 13:00–13:25 consolidation, 14:40–15:00 area). Held as intraday base most of the session. Broke ~15:05 ET with price closing below. Role flipped to resistance — rejected bounces confirm bear continuation; reclaim on closed bar = bull trigger candidate.
levels.notes: Price closed ~739.42, $1.38 below this level. Broke to become resistance per daily-review update.

levels.label: ROUND_740
levels.reasoning: Round $1 number. Psychological awareness only — not a structural level. Engine does NOT treat as trigger source or score modifier.
levels.notes: ~$1.09 above current. Price has been oscillating near this zone.

levels.label: BEAR_TARGET_2026-06-09
levels.reasoning: Next magnet level if 738.91 breaks on tomorrow's open. Per falsifiable hypothesis prediction 2. Round-number cluster, ~$3.91 below session low. Awareness for bear continuation scenario only.
levels.notes: Reference tier — engine does not treat as trigger source unless price action confirms at this level across 3+ sessions.

levels.label: SESSION_LOW_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: Today's session low (15:20 ET bar). Key floor — loss of this level on tomorrow's open = bear continuation. Hold + bounce = potential flush-and-reverse setup.
levels.notes: Current price. In-progress bar at capture time — may extend lower into close.
